title: Nether Reactor Heavy Core
description: Replaces the Heavy Core texture to a mini Nether Reactor Core
body:
This replaces the texture of the Heavy Core into a little version of the Nether Reactor Core from Pocket Edition!

Ain't it just cute?
![Tazzy holding a mini Nether Reactor Core](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/444ef52807ba5809c1b0de50fca775e2632d6550.jpeg)
